steps.title: Spot the “only one” signal
steps.content: The researchers stated Pbact was the “only one” with both a sufficiently high yield and a purity rate close to the ideal of 1.8. This reveals the dual criterion that defines success, explaining why CTAB 2X and Pplant each failed.

steps.title: Match the answer emphasizing the shared failure
steps.content: B identifies the significance of their shared weakness: both CTAB 2X and Pplant were deemed less effective than Pbact due to insufficient yield or purity. The other choices either list numbers without significance, claim false equivalence, or focus on comparison rather than shared failure. That matches choice B — B is correct.
